title: GitHub Foundations Part 1 of 2
summary: The GitHub Foundations Learning Path Part 1 of 2 is a concise and beginner-friendly journey designed to introduce you to the fundamental concepts and products of GitHub.

sections.title: GitHub Foundations Part 1 of 2
sections.summary: The GitHub Foundations Learning Path Part 1 of 2 is a concise and beginner-friendly journey designed to introduce you to the fundamental concepts and products of GitHub.

lessons.title: Introduction to Git
lessons.content_md:
Use Git to track changes and collaborate with other developers.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-git/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to use key GitHub features, including issues, notifications, branches, commits, and pull requests.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to GitHub's products
lessons.content_md:
Overview of GitHub's products, plans, associated features, and billing.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-introduction-products/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Configure code scanning on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
This module introduces you to code scanning and its features. You'll learn how to implement code scanning using CodeQL, third party tools, and GitHub Actions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-code-scanning/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Introduction to GitHub Copilot
lessons.content_md:
GitHub Copilot is an AI-powered coding assistant that helps you write, understand, refactor, and maintain code directly from your editor and chat interface.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-github-copilot/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Code with GitHub Codespaces
lessons.content_md:
In this tutorial, you learn about GitHub Codespaces, its lifecycle, how to personalize your codespace, the differences between Codespaces and github.dev, and build a personalized and customized codespace with devcontainer.json files.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/code-with-github-codespaces/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Manage your work with GitHub Projects
lessons.content_md:
Visualize large projects as spreadsheets or boards, and automate everything with code.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-work-github-projects/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage your work with GitHub Projects

lessons.title: Communicate effectively on GitHub using Markdown
lessons.content_md:
Learn to use Markdown to communicate with brevity, clarity, and expression.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/communicate-using-markdown/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Communicate effectively on GitHub using Markdown

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica GitHub Foundations Part 1 of 2
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **GitHub Foundations Part 1 of 2**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
